patterns_recognized: D-grade dual-signal-against (SP edge + PQI both opposing pick) maintains ~78% directional failure rate through 5/21 — five games today (PIT@TOR, MIN@BOS, NYM@MIA, SEA@KC, OAK@SD) carry this profile.
SP substitutions after CSV lock invalidate grade inputs: DET@BAL has Keegan Akin pitching today, not model-expected Chris Bassitt; 5/21 TOR@NYY had same pattern (Fisher→Macko).
Game postponements cannot be caught by the model: STL@CIN rained out per MLB API; requires OVERRIDE to NO_PICK regardless of model grade.
HARD CAP 7 near-zero bullpen gap threshold (≥0.000) fires twice today at +0.0041 (COL@ARI) and +0.0099 (CHW@SF); both are small positive gaps — tracking live firings before raising threshold.
C-grade GOLD CONFIRM without SP quality corroboration cost the sole staked pick on 5/21 (NYM@WSH 2-1 loss, Peterson beat Cavalli); B- minimum or SP/PQI corroboration required before CONFIRM GOLD.

HOU @ CHC.reasoning: F3_swing_take_gap=938.3 fires for CHC; Stage 1/2 tightly agree (Δ=0.0018); hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0004 (CHC bullpen marginally better, HARD CAP 7 does not fire). Edge=+2.15pp is below the 4pp floor — no stake despite GOLD tier. confidence_downgrade=True noted. Game was in progress (HOU 2-0 per API at analysis time) — early variance only, pre-game assessment applies. Yordan Alvarez is OWNER vs Taillon (12 PA, shrunk 0.815) — secondary headwind for CHC's SP but not decisive.
lessons_applied: edge below 4pp floor = no stake even on clean F3 GOLD
OWNER-level BvP (Alvarez vs Taillon) is qualitative color, not a decision flip per 5/21 ATL@MIA pattern

CLE @ PHI.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly fired (edge=-7.59pp < 0), demoting score 4→1. HARD CAP 10 fired on bottom-bucket without CONFIRM. PHI direction is supported by Sánchez's F1_xera_gap=2.62 advantage over Williams and PQI +34.9 strongly confirming PHI. Market at fair_prob=0.6402 correctly prices PHI 64% vs model 56.43% — market dominates. My CONFIRM prevents HARD CAP 10 from re-firing (score stays 1, B-) but no stake path exists due to negative edge.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 validated 6+ times: market pricing dominates any F-signal stack
CONFIRM PHI direction (SP+PQI both support) even with no stake path

TB @ NYY.reasoning: Gerrit Cole has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — PENDING_SP_DATA hard stop correctly applied. Live API confirms Cole (NYY home, returning from IL likely) and Nick Martinez (TB away). TB is 33-15 (elite record), NYY 30-21 — competitive matchup. Without Cole's Statcast data, SP quality is unquantifiable. No pick issued per protocol.
lessons_applied: thin_sp_data hard stop: 0 Statcast pitches = no grade regardless of team quality or opponent SP

PIT @ TOR.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with dual opposing signals: Gausman (TOR home) holds 1.59 xERA edge over Chandler, PQI +20.5 against PIT's late-game profile. fair_prob=0.3843 (market gives TOR only 38.4% chance, implying PIT is 61.6% per Vegas). D-grade dual-signal-against pattern shows ~78% directional failure rate through 5/21. fair_prob < 0.42 floor provides additional structural veto. SKIP correct.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against: ~78% directional failure rate through 5/21 (PIT@STL 6-2, STL@CIN patterns)
fair_prob < 0.42 floor provides independent structural veto

MIN @ BOS.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with dual opposing signals: Tolle (BOS home) holds 0.64 xERA edge over Prielipp, PQI +20.7 against MIN. f5_full_delta=0.1436 signals MIN relies on late innings to flip full-game odds, but PQI directly contradicts that late-game thesis. fair_prob=0.3965 < 0.42 floor adds third structural veto. API confirms Prielipp (MIN) and Tolle (BOS). SKIP correct.
lessons_applied: f5_full_delta=0.1436 with opposing PQI: bullpen-carry thesis contradicted by PQI signal
D-grade dual-signal-against: consistent directional failure pattern

NYM @ MIA.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with dual opposing signals: Myers (NYM away) holds 2.05 xERA edge over Pérez (MIA home), PQI -28.9 against MIA (one of the largest headwinds on the slate). f5_full_delta=0.1859 — MIA predicted to lose F5 (38%) but win full game (57%), relying entirely on late innings despite PQI strongly opposing. API confirms Myers vs Pérez. Double contradiction makes MIA direction structurally suspect. SKIP correct.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against: PQI -28.9 is the largest magnitude opposing any pick today
f5_full_delta=0.1859 with PQI against: analogous to 5/20 OAK@LAA (lost 6-5) and PIT@STL (lost 7-0)

DET @ BAL.reasoning: SP SUBSTITUTION: model used Chris Bassitt for BAL (home SP) but live API shows Keegan Akin pitching today. D-grade (-1) SKIP was already from Stage 1/2 disagree (Δ=0.2093 — BAL wins F5 only 44% but full game 65%): BAL's pick depends entirely on bullpen-carry thesis. With Akin replacing Bassitt, BAL's SP quality is materially weaker, further undermining the already-questionable late-inning leverage case. Jack Flaherty confirmed for DET. DOWNGRADE adds qualitative disqualification on top of existing grade weakness.
lessons_applied: SP substitution post-CSV-lock invalidates SP-edge inputs (5/21 TOR@NYY: Fisher→Macko preceded a directional loss)
Stage 1/2 disagree Δ=0.2093 + degraded home SP = compounding headwinds on bullpen-carry thesis

lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against: Gilbert quality vs Cameron analogous to 5/18 CHW@SEA OVERRIDE trigger
KC (20-30) structural weakness supports directional skepticism

LAD @ MIL.reasoning: Model pick is MIL (home) at B+ (score=3): Henderson holds 0.97 xERA edge over small-sample Wrobleski (71 PA), PQI confirms MIL, Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.04). Edge=+1.15pp is below 4pp floor — correctly no-staked. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0067 (MIL bullpen slightly better, HARD CAP 7 does not fire). confidence_downgrade=True noted. MIL 29-18 home record. Direction is sound but no stake path exists due to edge below floor.
lessons_applied: edge below 4pp floor = no stake regardless of B+ grade
small-sample opposing SP (Wrobleski, 71 PA) supports not elevating conviction above CONFIRM

TEX @ LAA.reasoning: Grayson Rodriguez (LAA home) has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — PENDING_SP_DATA hard stop correctly applied. COL @ ARI.reasoning: HARD CAP 2 (F3=2014>1000 without elite opposing SP, Sugano xERA=7.4, score 5→3) and HARD CAP 7 (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0041≥0, score 3→1) correctly applied despite extreme SP edge (Soroka vs Sugano: 2.73 xERA gap). bullpen_fatigue stress flag adds secondary caution. ARI direction (78.5% model prob, COL 19-32) is likely correct but both caps are enforced per protocol. Near-zero bullpen gap (0.0041) noted for threshold recalibration pending 30+ live CAP 7 firings. PLATINUM historical hit rate ~43% reinforces cap respect.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 2+7 enforced per protocol; pre-cap A (score=5) does not override systematic caps

STL @ CIN.reasoning: GAME POSTPONED. MLB API shows STL@CIN with status 'Postponed' (reason: Rain), rescheduled to 2026-05-23. Model had CIN at B- (score=1) with HARD CAP 1 fired on negative edge (-2.99pp) and Stage 1/2 disagreement (Δ=0.2021 — CIN wins F5 70.9% but full game only 50.7%). Game will not be played today regardless of grade. OVERRIDE to NO_PICK. No directional call appropriate for a postponed game.
lessons_applied: Game postponement requires OVERRIDE regardless of model grade — live API check catches what pre-game CSV cannot
Rain postponement confirmed: rescheduleDate=2026-05-23T17:10:00Z per MLB statsapi
